Comment: patch running results-api container and export static

commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker cp hermes/results_api/app.py election-results-api-1:/app/hermes/results_api/app.py && docker restart election-results-api-1 >/dev/null && for i in $(seq 1 30); do status=$(docker inspect --format "{{if .State.Health}}{{.State.Health.Status}}{{else}}{{.State.Status}}{{end}}" election-results-api-1); echo health=$status; if [ "$status" = "healthy" ] || [ "$status" = "running" ]; then break; fi; sleep 2; done && docker exec election-results-api-1 python -c "from hermes.results_api.app import export_static_governor_results; print(export_static_governor_results())"'
